extension_description.message: Flexible extensions to control your cookies
extension_description.description: The description of the extension shown in the browser store

extension_title.description: The default title shown in the browser toolbar

supporting_wrapper_title.description: The message shown when the page is not supported

supporting_wrapper_description.message: Cookies Pack does not support this page. Please try another page.
supporting_wrapper_description.description: The description shown when the page is not supported

cookies_table_empty_title.description: The message shown when no cookies are found

cookies_table_empty_description.message: There are no cookies available for the current site.
cookies_table_empty_description.description: The description shown when no cookies are found

cookies_table_columns_name.description: The cookies table column header for the cookie name

cookies_table_columns_path.description: The cookies table column header for the cookie path

cookies_table_columns_value.description: The cookies table column header for the cookie value

cookies_table_delete_cookie.description: The accessible label for the delete-cookie row action

cookies_table_add_cookie.description: The accessible label for the add-cookie header action

cookies_table_edit_cookie.description: The accessible label for the edit-cookie row action

cookies_table_cell_copied.description: The message briefly shown in a cookie table cell after its value is copied to the clipboard

cookies_table_copy_all_cookies.description: The accessible label for the copy-all-cookies header action

cookies_table_export_all_cookies.description: The accessible label for the export-all-cookies header action

cookies_table_export_filename.description: The suggested filename when exporting cookies

cookies_table_export_description.description: The file type description shown in the save-file picker

cookies_batch_update_placeholder.message: Update cookies with a cookie header, e.g. foo=bar; bat=baz; oof=rab
cookies_batch_update_placeholder.description: The placeholder for the cookie header textarea

cookies_batch_update_path_placeholder.description: The placeholder for the custom cookie path input

cookies_batch_update_path_label.description: The label for the use-custom-path switch

cookies_batch_update_clear_first_label.description: The label for the clear-existing-cookies-first switch

cookies_batch_update_replace_cookies.description: The submit button label when clear-existing-cookies-first is enabled

cookies_batch_update_add_cookies.description: The submit button label when clear-existing-cookies-first is disabled

options_icon_click_action_label.description: The label for the icon-click-action setting

options_icon_click_action_description.message: Choose what happens when you click the Cookies Pack icon in the toolbar.
options_icon_click_action_description.description: The description for the icon-click-action setting

options_icon_click_action_popup.description: The option to open the popup on icon click

options_icon_click_action_popup_descript.message: Shows the compact popup next to the toolbar icon.
options_icon_click_action_popup_descript.description: The description of the open-popup option

options_icon_click_action_sidepanel.description: The option to open the side panel on icon click

options_icon_click_action_sidepanel_desc.message: Opens Cookies Pack in the browser's side panel.
options_icon_click_action_sidepanel_desc.description: The description of the open-side-panel option

options_cookie_editor_enabled_label.description: The label for the cookie-editor-enabled setting

options_cookie_editor_enabled_descriptio.message: Show the add and edit cookie actions in the popup and side panel. Enabled by default.
options_cookie_editor_enabled_descriptio.description: The description for the cookie-editor-enabled setting

cookie_editor_title_add.description: The title of the cookie editor page when adding a new cookie

cookie_editor_title_edit.description: The title of the cookie editor page when editing an existing cookie

cookie_editor_back.description: The accessible label for the back action leaving the cookie editor

cookie_editor_name_label.description: The label for the cookie name field

cookie_editor_name_placeholder.description: The placeholder for the cookie name field

cookie_editor_value_label.description: The label for the cookie value field

cookie_editor_value_placeholder.description: The placeholder for the cookie value field

cookie_editor_domain_label.description: The label for the cookie domain field

cookie_editor_domain_placeholder.description: The placeholder for the cookie domain field

cookie_editor_path_label.description: The label for the cookie path field

cookie_editor_path_placeholder.description: The placeholder for the cookie path field

cookie_editor_same_site_label.description: The label for the cookie SameSite select

cookie_editor_secure_label.description: The label for the cookie secure switch

cookie_editor_http_only_label.description: The label for the cookie HTTP-only switch

cookie_editor_session_label.description: The label for the session-cookie switch

cookie_editor_expiration_label.description: The label for the cookie expiration date field

cookie_editor_error_required.description: The validation error shown when a required cookie editor field is empty

cookie_editor_error_path.description: The validation error shown when the cookie path does not start with a slash

cookie_editor_cancel.description: The label for the cancel button in the cookie editor

cookie_editor_save.description: The label for the save button in the cookie editor
